name: Resonator
description: Implementation of the open source Rings module by Émilie Gillet. Can be played via MIDI or I2C, or simply via CV/gate as the original. Relies on input parameters being enabled or not since the algorithm has no way of knowing whether its sockets are connected or not.

parameters.name: Mode
parameters.description: Selects the resonator mode.

parameters.name: Synth effect
parameters.description: If the mode is 'Synth', selects the audio effect applied to the synth output.

parameters.name: Polyphony
parameters.description: Sets the number of simultaneous voices.

parameters.name: Coarse tune
parameters.description: Provides a coarse tuning control.

parameters.name: Fine tune
parameters.description: Provides a fine tuning control.

parameters.name: Structure
parameters.description: Controls the resonator 'structure'.

parameters.name: Brightness
parameters.description: Controls the resonator 'brightness'.

parameters.name: Damping
parameters.description: Controls the resonator 'damping'.

parameters.name: Position
parameters.description: Controls the resonator 'position'.

parameters.name: Chord
parameters.description: Chooses the chord to use for resonator modes that use one. In the original, set from the Structure knob.

parameters.name: Noise gate
parameters.description: Enables a noise gate on the audio input. Always enabled in the original Rings.

parameters.name: Input gain
parameters.description: A gain applied to the input audio, before it hits the resonator.

parameters.name: Odd output mode
parameters.description: The Add/Replace mode for the Odd output.

parameters.name: Even output mode
parameters.description: The Add/Replace mode for the Even output.

parameters.name: Output gain
parameters.description: The output level (of both the Odd and Even outputs).

parameters.name: Dry gain
parameters.description: The level of the input audio mixed into the output(s).

parameters.name: MIDI mode
parameters.description: Controls the algorithm's response to MIDI. See below.

parameters.name: I2C mode
parameters.description: Controls the algorithm's response to I2C. See below.

parameters.name: MIDI channel
parameters.description: The MIDI channel to receive on.

parameters.name: I2C channel
parameters.description: The I2C channel to receive on.

input_ports.name: Strum input
input_ports.description: Chooses which input bus to use for 'strum'.

input_ports.name: V/Oct input
input_ports.description: Chooses which input bus to use for the V/octave pitch CV.

input_ports.name: Audio input
input_ports.description: Chooses which input bus to use for the audio input.

input_ports.name: Brightness input
input_ports.description: Chooses which input bus to use for 'brightness'.

input_ports.name: Frequency input
input_ports.description: Chooses which input bus to use for 'frequency'.

input_ports.name: Damping input
input_ports.description: Chooses which input bus to use for 'damping'.

input_ports.name: Structure input
input_ports.description: Chooses which input bus to use for 'structure'.

input_ports.name: Position input
input_ports.description: Chooses which input bus to use for 'position'.

input_ports.name: Strum input
input_ports.description: Chooses which input bus to use for 'strum'.

input_ports.name: V/Oct input
input_ports.description: Chooses which input bus to use for the V/octave pitch CV.

input_ports.name: Audio input
input_ports.description: Chooses which input bus to use for the audio input.

input_ports.name: Brightness input
input_ports.description: Chooses which input bus to use for 'brightness'.

input_ports.name: Frequency input
input_ports.description: Chooses which input bus to use for 'frequency'.

input_ports.name: Damping input
input_ports.description: Chooses which input bus to use for 'damping'.

input_ports.name: Structure input
input_ports.description: Chooses which input bus to use for 'structure'.

input_ports.name: Position input
input_ports.description: Chooses which input bus to use for 'position'.

output_ports.name: Odd output
output_ports.description: The bus to use for the Odd output.

output_ports.name: Even output
output_ports.description: The bus to use for the Even output.

output_ports.name: Odd output
output_ports.description: The bus to use for the Odd output.

output_ports.name: Even output
output_ports.description: The bus to use for the Even output.
